final:
module sr_flip_flop (
    input wire S,
    input wire R,
    input wire clk,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (S && !R) begin Q <= 1 ; // Set end else if (!S && R) begin Q <= 0 ; // Reset end else if (S && R) begin // Undefined state, keep Q as is
  end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  // If S=0 and R=0, Q remains unchanged;
  end
endmodule
